stemHtml: The pilots prepare and trim the aircraft for take-off, setting the trim for a CG position at 24% of the MAC. But due to an error, the real position of the CG is at 12% of the MAC. What could this cause?

options.a: The length of the runway may not be sufficient to take-off.
options.b: Large stick forces are required to achieve rotation.
options.c: Risk of over rotation that can lead to a tail strike.
